endpoints.gap_note: G-05: frontend snake_case (stem_text) → backend camelCase (stemText); jackson mapping needed

endpoints.frontend_params: cursor?, status?('active'|'mastered'), subject?, tags[]?, difficulty?, limit?
endpoints.gap_note: G-08: frontend status is 'active'|'mastered' string; backend status is integer; controller must translate
G-07: frontend expects image_url (pre-signed URL) in VO; arch VO schema is incomplete
G-01 BLOCKER: semantic mismatch — frontend does bulk replace via PATCH; arch uses individual POST/DELETE
G-02 BLOCKER: endpoint called by frontend but not defined in s3-wrongbook.md §4.1

status_type.mapping_note: G-03 BLOCKER: frontend has 'error' state; arch has no 'error' state (6 states vs 4 strings); 'pending'→draft(0), 'analyzing'→analyzed(1), 'completed'→scheduled/reviewed/mastered(2/3/8), 'error'→no mapping. WrongItemVO must serialize backend SMALLINT to frontend string — requires explicit mapping decision.

suggested_mapping.error_note: frontend 'error' state has no backend counterpart — may need a new status or a separate field

vo_fields.gap_note: G-07: arch VO must include all frontend-expected fields with jackson snake_case serialization

states.name: analyzed
states.trigger: S4 embedding + knowledge tags 回填

states.name: mastered
states.trigger: SM-2 连续 N 次 quality≥4

transitions.trigger: SM-2 连续 N 次 quality≥4

invariants: INV-01: WrongItem.status 迁移仅允许预定义边（Service 层守卫）
INV-02: WrongItem.version 单调递增（JPA @Version 管理，业务代码禁手动 +1）
INV-03: 每 WrongItem 至多 1 张 role='ORIGIN' 图（DB 唯一索引 uq_wii_item_origin）
INV-04: WrongItemTag (wrong_item_id, tag_code) 唯一（DB 唯一索引 uq_wit_item_tag）
INV-05: deleted_at IS NOT NULL 时禁止任何更新（400）
INV-07: difficulty 仅 1..5 或 NULL；mastery 仅 0..2
INV-08: WrongItemTag.tag_code 必须存在于 tag_taxonomy.code

idempotency.fallback: DB unique index on idem_key table (S1 V1.0.052)

soft_delete.hibernate_sql_delete: UPDATE wrong_item SET deleted_at=now() WHERE id=?
soft_delete.audit_log: 同事务 INSERT audit_log(action='delete', target_type='wrong_item', target_id=?, request_id=?)

optimistic_lock.request_body: PATCH /items/{id} body 必须携带 version 字段

mq_outbox.fallback: catch → INSERT wrong_item_outbox(PENDING) · S10 scheduler 补发

forbidden: 直接 INSERT outbox 跳过 syncSend 尝试

allowed: 手写枚举 + Service 守卫

transaction.rule: @Transactional 作用域内同步 INSERT audit_log

adr_bindings: ADR 0006: JPA + QueryDSL over MyBatis（硬绑定）
ADR 0010: 手写枚举状态机（本 Phase 新立）
ADR 0011: version 列乐观锁（Q1-R1 决议）
ADR 0014: WrongAttempt 独立聚合根（Q4-R1 决议）

layers.label: 实体层（Entity / Domain Model）
key_rules: WrongItem 唯一聚合根（@AggregateRoot 语义）
@SQLDelete(sql='UPDATE wrong_item SET deleted_at=now() WHERE id=?') + @Where(clause='deleted_at IS NULL')
@Version Long version（JPA 管理，业务代码禁手动 +1）
主键：@GeneratedValue 替换为 Snowflake 自定义 IdGenerator
subject 9 学科枚举（S1 DDL 权威，非计划的 5 学科）
status SMALLINT（0/1/2/3/8/9），transitionStatus() 守卫非法迁移
WrongAttempt 为独立聚合根（Q4-R1 决议，ADR 0014）
migrations_required: V1.0.020__wrong_item_version.sql (ADD COLUMN version BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)
V1.0.021__wrong_item_difficulty.sql (ADD COLUMN difficulty SMALLINT CHECK 1..5 OR NULL)

layers.label: 仓储层（Repository）
key_rules: 继承 JpaRepository<Entity, Long>
复杂列表查询（subject/tagCode/status/cursor 过滤）用 QueryDSL Predicate
软删 @Where 在 Entity 层已处理，Repository 无需额外 filter
cursor 分页：按 id DESC，cursor = base64(id)

layers.label: 业务层（Service）
key_rules: 状态迁移守卫：transitionStatus(target) 校验合法边，非法抛 400
幂等：POST /items 先 Redis GET idem:wb:{requestId}，命中返回 200+原VO
@Transactional 内同步 INSERT audit_log（强一致）
MQ syncSend 失败 catch → INSERT wrong_item_outbox(PENDING)
WrongItemVO.status 序列化为前端 string（'pending'/'analyzing'/'completed'/'error'）—— G-03 解决方案待 User 确认
PATCH tags：G-01 解决方案待 User 确认（bulk replace vs 逐条 diff）

layers.label: 控制层（Controller + DTO）
key_rules: 路径前缀 /wrongbook（无 /api/v1/，gateway 统一加）
409 由 ObjectOptimisticLockingFailureException → WrongbookExceptionHandler 处理
X-Request-Id 在 POST /items 强制校验（@RequestHeader + 400 if missing）
响应字段 snake_case（Jackson @JsonProperty 或 spring.jackson.property-naming-strategy=SNAKE_CASE）
GET /wrongbook/tags：G-02 新增端点，返回 tag_taxonomy 活跃标签列表

layers.label: OpenAPI 规格（springdoc）
key_rules: 11 个端点全部有 @Operation(summary=...) 注解
所有 DTO @Schema 注解
WrongItemVO 字段需与前端 types.ts 对齐（snake_case + 正确类型）

resolved_gaps.G-01: arch 补 PATCH /wrongbook/items/{id}/tags (BulkTagReq · bulk replace · If-Match version header)
resolved_gaps.G-02: arch 补 GET /wrongbook/tags (tag_taxonomy active 标签列表)
resolved_gaps.G-03: WrongItemVO.status 序列化为 string (0→pending, 1→analyzing, 2/3/8/9→completed); error 态延至 S4
resolved_gaps.G-04: studentId 从 JWT auth context 注入，CreateWrongItemReq 移除 studentId 字段
resolved_gaps.G-05: snake_case 全局 Jackson 配置
resolved_gaps.G-07: image_url 本 Phase 返回 null
